subcodes.first_line: Praised be Thou, O my God! This servant of Thine testifieth that naught else except Thee can ever express Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی قد اعترف عبدک هذا بانک لاتوصف بسواک و لاتذکر بدونک کلما
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
